title: Application - Update from previous app version while using cloud account (TBD)
scenario: Cloud account user updates Poly Studio Mobile app from previous version
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android device.
2. Ensure you are signed in with a cloud account.
3. Navigate to Account screen and note the current app version.
4. Go to Google Play Store and check for available updates for Poly Studio Mobile.
5. If an update is available, download and install the update.
6. After the update completes, relaunch Poly Studio Mobile app.
7. Observe the app behavior after the update while still signed in with the cloud account.
expected: The app updates successfully, the user remains signed in to their cloud account, and all settings and device pairings are preserved.
